cashless_hospitalization: Photo ID proof (Aadhaar / PAN / Passport / Driving Licence)
reimbursement_hospitalization: Duly filled and signed claim form
Original discharge summary from the hospital
Original hospital bills with itemized breakup
All diagnostic reports (X-ray, MRI, CT, blood work)
Doctor's consultation papers and operation notes
Photo ID proof and address proof
Cancelled cheque or bank passbook copy
All papers must be submitted within 30 days of discharge
day_care_procedure: Procedure summary or operation notes from the hospital
pre_post_hospitalization: Original prescriptions (within 30 days before and 60 days after hospitalization)
Linkage proof to the main hospitalization claim
maternity: Discharge summary mentioning delivery type (normal / C-section)
Baby's birth certificate or hospital birth record
Photo ID proof of the mother
